lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Have you spoken to Hild about locating Bob?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: She lives in the village, just follow the path north a little.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll speak to her.

lines.speaker: Hild
lines.text: Greetings Adventurer, why have you come to me in my abode?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Greetings Hild, I am trying to find Unferth's cat...

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Unferth's cat? Pfft! Unferth is Bob's human!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Hild
lines.text: Your cat speaks some truth, it is humans that misinterpret their relationship with cats.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You understand what my cat is saying?!

lines.speaker: Hild
lines.text: Indeed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er...

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Bob didn't come home this week.

lines.speaker: Hild
lines.text: Hmm. This is not like Bob, I wonder what could be the problem?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I don't think there is a problem, Bob is probably chasing females again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello? I'm still here!

lines.speaker: Hild
lines.text: I am sorry [player name]. I will help Unferth find Bob, he has been a friend of mine for many years.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah... good! He could be anywhere though!

lines.speaker: Hild
lines.text: I see you have an Amulet of Catspeak. If you open the amulet up, you will see contained inside is a mechanism. If this is enchanted correctly it can be used to locate a cat, in our case Bob. If you bring me five death runes

lines.speaker: Hild
lines.text: then I will be able to perform the enchantment for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the death runes.

lines.speaker: Hild
lines.text: Come back to me when you have them.

sections.title: Talking to Hild again before enchanting the amulet

lines.speaker: Hild
lines.text: Greetings Adventurer, do you have the death runes so I can enchant your Amulet of Catspeak?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Hild
lines.text: Come back to me when you have them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have the death runes with me now.

lines.speaker: Hild
lines.text: Good. Give me the amulet so that I may perform the enchantment.

lines.speaker: Hild
lines.text: Using the enchanted amulet is easy; open up the amulet and you'll see a cat's face, use the whiskers to rotate the cats nose. You'll see the nose move and the new direction highlighted. When the nose points in the

lines.speaker: Hild
lines.text: direction that Bob is in, the eyes will light up and the mouth will open. You'll need to head in that direction and then check the direction again. If you are very close to Bob then the eyes and mouth will animate no

lines.speaker: Hild
lines.text: matter which way the nose is pointing. That's all there is to it, good luck!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Hello, do you have a cat?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I do but my cat is in a safe place.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Oh, hmm.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Hello, I see you have a cat.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Meow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Indeed I do! Do you have a cat?

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: I do! His name is Bob but I can't find him!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear...

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: I haven't seen him for a week! What am I to do?!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Meow, meow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... My cat is trying to say something but I'm not wearing the Amulet of Catspeak.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: What a wet blanket, Bob can look after himself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I know puss, but he is in distress.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Whaa...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell you what. I'll help you!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Would you? Oh that would be so great!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: I don't want to leave the house in case Bob comes back.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: He must be hungry by now!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: This guy gets on my nerves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shh!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... Where did you see Bob last?

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Well he usually comes back to me once a week. Usually a Wednesday a bit before lunchtime.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wonder why it's on a Wednesday.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Hmph, well, this week he hasn't come back for his food and I'm worried.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So he could be anywhere?

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: I guess so.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: I've just had an idea!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Oh my, you win... a biscuit!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Puss!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Do you want to help or not?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I said I would, didn't I?

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: My friend Hild is cleverer than me...

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: ANYONE would be 'cleverer'!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hehe!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: This isn't funny!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Where was I? Oh yes... my friend Hild might be able to locate where Bob is, she lives in the house just up the road.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok. I'll go speak to her!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Please hurry!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Bob!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Hmph...Oh Neite...My bounty is as boundless as the sea, my love as deep. The more I give to thee, the more I have, for both are infinite.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: OK OK... This is becoming dangerous. If we don't do something he will probably implode! We'll go to Gertrude and ask if she knows who your parents are!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again Gertrude!

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Welcome back adventurer! How is your cat?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Meow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... My cat is trying to say something but I'm not wearing the Amulet of Catspeak.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I'm fine thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He says he's fine.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: What can I do for you then? I hope it's not about death runes. I heard a terrible rumour you know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Death runes? No idea.... No, it's not that. I, erm...

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Come on, spit it out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This is going to sound silly...

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Why, are you going to talk in a stupid accent? Go on, try me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok... Well... Do you know who Bob's parents are?

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Bob.... you mean the big tomcat who hangs around the Heroes' guild? No, I'm afraid I don't know a lot about him. People round here know I care for sick and abandoned animals, and one day I found a basket with

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: a kitten inside it left on my doorstep. I brought him up as best I could and he soon learnt to take care of himself. He really was an amazing little thing. There was this one time when.....

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: We don't have time for this, Bob could be in trouble! Tell her to get on with it.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Crumbs! Your cat's quite noisy isn't it? Is everything OK?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, it's erm... It needs to be taken to the vets, URGENTLY. For an emergency AMPUTATION!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I do hope you're joking. These claws are real you know, none of your bronze nonsense.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See, it just can't stop howling. Allergic to cat hair apparently. Anyway, you were talking about Bob's parents.

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Oh was I... Oh yes, well, I'm afraid I don't know anything about them adventurer.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Hang on, maybe this is something to do with the legend... yes, it just might. Have you ever heard of Robert the Strong?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Vaguely?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Ask Gertrude if she knows anything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... Gertrude, do you know anything of the legend, Robert the Strong?

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: No, sorry. If it's a legend, it's Reldo you need to talk to. He's in Varrock palace library, knows all about that kind of thing.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Good old Gertrude! Come on, lets go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But...

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I'll explain later!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Gertrude!

lines.speaker: Gertrude
lines.text: Greetings adventurer, have you spoken to Reldo in the palace library about Robert the Strong?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Come on, lets go.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Hello there, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a cat related question.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Meow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... My cat is trying to say something but I'm not wearing the Amulet of Catspeak.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Go on... ask him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, okay. I'm on it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know anything about Robert the Strong?

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Ah, Robert the Strong. There's some details on him in one of my books on the history of Gielinor. Let's see now...

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Fourth Age... Popular Lore... Ah here we are, Robert the Strong!

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: 'Not much is known about the hero called Robert the Strong. Most folk tales describe him as being taller than the tallest human and far stronger than the strongest warrior.'

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: 'He wields a six foot tall longbow and travels with his faithful panther, Odysseus. He is said to have had a personal crusade against the dragonkin...'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Dragonkin?

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: I'm coming to that.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: 'The stories tell of the dragonkin being an intelligent race of bird-like creatures that walked rather than using their wings. They are said to be immortal, but cannot reproduce.'

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: 'Because of this, they became very afraid of death and shunned all other races.'

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: 'Some even say the dragonkin made corrupted versions of themselves for protection, what we now know as dragons. However, this has never been proven.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... Doesn't sound very believable.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: There's no doubt that some elements of these tales have been overexaggerated for storytelling purposes, but you should be careful of outright dismissing them.

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Robert the Strong is a name that often comes up in stories from the Fourth Age. There's no reason not to believe that these folk tales are based on events that actually happened.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you Reldo, you've been most... helpful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That was a nice tale for mothers to tell their children, but I don't see how this helps Bob?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Don't you think it's odd that no one knows where Bob came from?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess, but he's just a cat... right?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I'd hoped you would've understood by now that there's more to cats than humans believe!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, ok! I get your point, after all I'm being dragged round Gielinor by... my cat!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I wouldn't say dragged... let's call it a partnership!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So are you saying that Robert the Strong is... is...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bob?!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Let's ask Bob!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's go!

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Hello there, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, about Robert the Strong...

lines.speaker: Reldo
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind, I've found out enough now, I should go back to Bob.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: We've found out enough now, we should go back to Bob.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bob! I've found you at last!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Hi Bob!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Hi there son.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't start that again!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: The humans have been looking for you, they get worried too easily.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Ah. I should've realised Unferth would miss me.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: What's up?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Sigh. I can't believe it but I've fallen for Neite!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Neite...now, I'm sure I've heard that name before...

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: What a beauty she is! It's the way the shimmer from the hot sand makes her eyes sparkle, the way she flicks her tail as she leaps gracefully across the pyramids, the way she cleans herself after a good rat. As you humans

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: would say, she's the cat's whiskers. Oh how I long to be curled up with her in front of a log fire and a big bowl of tuna. Menaphos would be a great place to start a family.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Wow! He's got it bad! Real bad! I never thought I'd see the day!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: I know but there is something about her. The way she...well, it's everything! Oh, the hidden pain of love. Love lies not with the eyes but with the mind, and therefore is the winged Cupid painted blind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm starting to feel sick...

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: I haven't been home because I've wanted to be alone.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Does Neite feel the same way about you?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: She said she has feelings for me but would never get involved with someone like me that has no family or status.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Don't you know who your parents are?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: All I know is that Gertrude found me on her doorstep one day. She looked after me when I was a kitten.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The crazy cat lady?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Don't you have any memory of your parents?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Nothing! The furthest back I can remember is Gertrude looking after me.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: [player name] let's go and talk to Gertrude! Perhaps she knows who Bob's parents are!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do I look like a match maker?!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Come on! We can help Bob!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Bob!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Have you been to the Sphinx yet?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: No we haven't. Come on [player name], let's go.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Have you found Bob yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, we're working on it.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Please hurry, I'm worried.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day.

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: What is it human?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sphinx, we need your help!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Yes, please help!

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Very well, I see you have a close relationship with your cat, I will help you if I can.

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: What is the problem?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bob is in love with Neite but we need to prove that he used to be Robert the Strong before she will have anything to do with him!

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Slow down human!

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Bob has fallen in love?

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: This I did not foresee!

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Who is this Robert the Strong that you speak of?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He was a mighty hero!

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Human myths interest me not.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Robert the Strong was no ordinary human though!

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: It is true that there is something about Bob... there is the mark of power on him, I have ignored it for too long.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But Bob has no memory of this!

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Then it is the time for action!

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Come with me into the desert so we are not disturbed.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Meow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... My cat is trying to say something but I'm not wearing the Amulet of Catspeak.

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Quiet please.... I shall summon Bob.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: What..? What happened?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: I was eating a particularly nice piece of tuna.

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Greetings Bob.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Oh, hi there Sphinx.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Hi there [player name], what's going on?

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: I have brought you here to find out who you really are.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: So you buy this Robert the Strong stuff?

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: I have long suspected that your appearance as an ordinary cat belies your true nature.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Hey! I'm just this cat, you know?

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Look into my eyes.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Sure... whatever.

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: You are now under my influence.

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Let's start with something simple. What is your name?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: My name is Bob.

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Good. Are you or have you ever been called Robert the Strong?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: I... I don't know.

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Think back to your earliest memories.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: I see a big cat...

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Where are you now?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: I am in front of a dark tower... the cat is called Odysseus.

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: What is your name?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: My name is Robert.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: I am walking towards the tower...

lines.speaker: Robert the Strong
lines.text: Come, Odysseus!

lines.speaker: Dragonkin
lines.text: Hesente!

lines.speaker: Dragonkin
lines.text: Crasortius!

lines.speaker: Robert the Strong
lines.text: Never!

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: You are no longer under my influence.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Wow Bob! You really are Robert the Strong!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: I am?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Yes! When you were hypnotised you told us of when you defeated a dragonkin!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: I did?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Yes! How can Neite refuse you now!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Sphinx, summon Neite please!

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: There are more important matters than match making.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: That can wait! Bob has been love sick, we have to tell Neite!

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Very well! I shall summon Neite!

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: Oh... furballs!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Hi Neite!

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: Hello, to what do I owe this pleasure?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Bob is Robert the Strong!

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: The Sphinx hypnotised Bob. Bob told us about when he was Robert the Strong fighting dragonkin.

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: So you're supposed to be Robert the Strong?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: So they tell me.

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: Hmph.

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: For too long I have ignored the fact that there is a mark of power on Bob. Under my influence Bob was able to recall memories that had remained hidden until now. It proves he is, or was, Robert the Strong.

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: Wow.

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: Come here you.

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: (Neite whispers in Bob's ear.)

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Neite!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Of course kitten.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Hey [player name], could you do me a favour?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Myself and Neite are going away for a few days. Could you look after Unferth for me whilst I'm away?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... sure.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: I'll give you a list of what needs doing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK, no problem Bob.

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: [player name], since you are to look after Unferth, shall I teleport you to his house?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day.

lines.speaker: Sphinx
lines.text: Have you completed the chores that Bob asked you to?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Come on!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Bob!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Did you find out who my parents are?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not exactly...

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: We think you are... or used to be... Robert the Strong!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Robert the who?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought this was stupid.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Robert the Strong was a great hero, you have no memory of him?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: No... I'm afraid not.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Does a black panther called Odysseus ring any bells?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: No...

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: What about the dragonkin? A vicious race of bird like creatures?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Nothing...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looks like theres nothing else we can do puss.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I'm not done yet!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Do you remember when you were hypnotised by the Devourer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well no... I was hypnotised!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Hehe!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: The Sphinx understood how you were hypnotised, it might be able to access Bob's memories of Robert the Strong.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds crazy... guess it might work!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Bye for now Bob, we're going to speak to the Sphinx.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Bye.

sections.title: Talking to your cat about chores

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I have to do for 'Tidy House'?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Look round the house for anything messy that needs to be put right.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: You've finished that chore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I have to do for 'Warm Human'?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Theres only one source of warmth in the house, I suggest you use it.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: You've finished that chore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I have to do for 'Feed Human'?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: There's a table with empty dishes, I think they need refilling.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What does Unferth eat?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I've no idea, perhaps you can find out.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: You've finished that chore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I have to do for 'Tidy Human'?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Have you noticed that Unferth's hair has grown rather long?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know where I can get some scissors?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: It's so long I should think you'd need shears to cut it!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: You've finished that chore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I have to do for 'Tend Garden'?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Check the garden to see if anything needs tending.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Check the garden to see if anything needs tending.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've weeded the garden, now what?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I'm sure there should be something growing in the garden.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: You've finished that chore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not touching someone else's bed!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Well done, that's all the chores finished!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Let's talk to Unferth to see if there's anything else we can do.

sections.title: Talking to your cat after finishing the chores

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So. Now what?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: You've done all the chores so you should see if Unferth needs anything else done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Unferth, I'm doing some ch...

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Hiss!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Don't tell him you're doing his chores!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Part of the cat-human relationship is to let them believe they are in control.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah... OK.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Hmph.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Meow!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... My cat is trying to say something but I'm not wearing the Amulet of Catspeak.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: I think I need the Doctor...ugh...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I'll get the Apothecary from Varrock!

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: I am the Apothecary. I brew potions. Do you need anything specific?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Apothecary, Unferth has fallen ill. Could you go and see him please?

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: That Unferth! Honestly, I have been to see him more times than my Mother's hair has fallen out!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I never did like that guy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm beginning to agree with you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can I do with Unferth?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I have a few suggestions!

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: It's quite simple. Unferth is what we call a hypochondriac; he isn't ill but he thinks he is. All you need to do is convince him you are a Doctor or a Nurse and give him a potion to make him 'better'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I make Unferth believe I am a Doctor or Nurse?

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: Easy, make sure you are dressed in white robes and take one of these hats to wear.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: Then all you need to do is give him a vial of water and he'll take it thinking it's a cure potion.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Haha!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I always wanted to be a Doctor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Apothecary.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: Have you been to 'cure' Unferth by dressing up in white robes, wearing the hat and giving him a vial of water?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's what I was going to do! Thanks, I'll see you later.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: I am the Apothecary. I brew potions. Do you need anything specific?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Apothecary, I've lost that hat you gave me.

lines.speaker: Apothecary
lines.text: No problem, I get plenty of these from Gielinor Hospital Supplies.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day Unferth, I am Doctor [player name].

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: No you're not! A Doctor wouldn't be holding that!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: I am so glad to see you Doctor!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: I am not a well man!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What seems to be the problem?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Theres something wrong with his head!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: My back hurts!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem...

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: I think my arm is broken!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We can...

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Then there's my spleen!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your what...?

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: My liver has packed in!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All you need to do is take this potion.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Is that it?! I'm much more ill than that!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: We could offer to bonk him on the head with a big hammer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hehe!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Doctor Please take this seriously! I demand treatment!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course sir! The potion I have given you is the latest technology. It cures all known illnesses, and a few unknown ones. It's what we call in the trade a 'miracle cure'.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Wow! What can I say... I feel special!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you feel better?

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: I'm not sure...

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Argh!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Wait! I feel something! Yes! I can feel the potion working... The pain has gone... I can walk on my leg... Doctor! I'm cured!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's... great! Phew!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Indeed. Bob should be back by now; let's go find him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Unferth.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: I feel much better now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's good to hear.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: We should go and see Bob now Unferth is feeling better, he should be back by now.

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Meow, meow.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... My cat is trying to say something but I'm not wearing the Amulet of Catspeak.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Unferth, is there anything I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Ugh...

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Now what?!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: I don't feel so good...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear! What's up?

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Nothing, I bet!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shh!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: I think I need the Doctor...ugh...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What Doctor is that?

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Just a Doctor... please hurry... I don't think I'll last long...

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: Snarl!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We can't let Bob see him like this!

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: I guess you're right, there is the Apothecary in Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good idea!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Unferth!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Hello! Bob came home today! I'm so happy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's good news!

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Fat lot of use you were! He came home on his own!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er...

lines.speaker: Cat
lines.text: This guy is unbelievable!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're not wrong.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Of course I'm not wrong.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be going now.

lines.speaker: Unferth
lines.text: Before you go, I found the strangest thing. There was a package left under the bed, it's addressed to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi Bob! How's it hang... going?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Wonderful! Neite and I have been all over Gielinor! We 'borrowed' a magic carpet...

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Where do we turn here?

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: North... I think.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: You think?!

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: Yes: north.

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: Slow down!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: For what?

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: That camel!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: What camel?!

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: Are you sure this is a good idea?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Yeh, the old King and I go way back.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Hey old King! How's things?

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon
lines.text: Same as always: adventurers trying to kill me.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: There, there, could be worse!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon
lines.text: I guess... one moment...

lines.speaker: R4ng3rNo0b889
lines.text: Lolz die noob!

lines.speaker: King Black Dragon
lines.text: See what I mean?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Mate! You need a new line of work!

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: I said left at the camel!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: What camel?!

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: You're too close to the pyramid!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: Do you want to drive?!

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: I think we're lost.

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: No, I know where I'm going.

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: Are we there yet?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Neite
lines.text: Are we there yet?

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Bob
lines.text: I'm the King of Gielinor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Phew!
